query: SELECT actorId, name, actorType as type, origin, threatLevel, sophistication, motivation, firstSeen, lastActive, LEFT(description, 200) as descSnippet FROM threat_actors WHERE description IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(description) > 50 ORDER BY CASE WHEN threatLevel = 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN threatLevel = 'high' THEN 2 WHEN threatLevel = 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, updatedAt DESC LIMIT 15
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2k2SuDvpDb6F44q.5f28f8362a85 --database VmWWcXQYZJYuALRdNNvsC2 --execute SELECT actorId, name, actorType as type, origin, threatLevel, sophistication, motivation, firstSeen, lastActive, LEFT(description, 200) as descSnippet FROM threat_actors WHERE description IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(description) > 50 ORDER BY CASE WHEN threatLevel = 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN threatLevel = 'high' THEN 2 WHEN threatLevel = 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, updatedAt DESC LIMIT 15
